# XCA Consult ApS

> XCA Consult ApS is a one-man IT consultancy based in Aarhus, Denmark, founded and run by Erik Olsen. The company delivers high-quality software architecture and development services to clients across Denmark.

## About Erik Olsen

Erik Olsen is a freelance software architect and developer with 20+ years of experience from industries including Finance, Insurance, Classifieds, and Retail. He holds an M.Sc. in Mathematics (Geometry and Topology) from Aarhus University.

He specialises in helping companies modernise their IT — transitioning towards service-oriented and event-driven architectures — contributing across the full journey from vision and strategy to execution and maintenance.

## Services

- **Software Development**: Full-cycle development and architecture, from refining and designing to delivery and maintenance. Senior developer and architect profile, collaborative and business-driven.
- **Architecture Review**: Independent review of system architecture, code quality, and security. Findings delivered in a meeting and in writing with clear, actionable recommendations.
- **Second Opinion**: Advisory input on important IT projects or landscape changes, drawing on broad cross-industry experience.
- **Domain Driven Design Workshop**: Two-day workshop to clarify project needs and establish a solid design foundation before feature development begins.

## Professional Experience

- External Consultant (Developer and Architect) — BankData (2026–present)
- Software Developer, Payment Engine — Vipps MobilePay (2023–2026)
- Tech Consultant (Architect) — Lunar (2022)
- Developer and Architect — OK a.m.b.a (2021–2022)
- Chief Software Engineer — Danske Bank (2020–2021)
- External Consultant (Architect and Tech Lead) — BankData (2019–2020)
- Senior Developer — MobilePay (2015–2018)
- Senior Developer — eBay / bilbasen.dk (2012–2015)

## Technical Competencies

**Languages**: C#, Java, Go, SQL
**Frameworks**: .NET Core, ASP.NET Core, Quarkus
**Technology**: Azure, AWS, OpenShift, Kafka, RabbitMQ, Docker, Kubernetes, Cassandra, ELK Stack
**Architecture**: Domain Driven Design, Event Driven Architecture, Microservices, CQRS, API Design, OpenID Connect, OAuth 2, TOGAF, API Gateways, Observability
**Human languages**: Danish, English
